title: astragalus plumosus
intro: Astragalus plumosus, also known as plumose milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus plumosus are said to include enhanced immune function, reduced oxidative stress, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus plumosus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
